title: Drive-By-Wire
description: Control your VS2 vehicles via Cables
body: Have you ever had your redstone links conflict? Wanted to build a car without those antenna sticking out the floor? Well, here's the perfect product for you! Introducing Drive-By-Wire _Cables_, a tried-and-true way of connecting your vehicles without any shenanigans involved. # Why should you use _Cables_ over redstone links on ships? * No links all over your build in awkward places * No need to remember if your door control frequency is button+door, grass+door or netherite sword+door * No need to have a million colored blocks in your inventory * No conflicts ever (the best part!) * Compatibility with lecterns so your vehicle _Cables_ are neat and tidy Why wait? Try _Cables_ today! More Valkyrien Skies 2 addons in the discord:   _(Warranty void if Cables is plugged into any socket or carries any redstone signal. Drive-By-Wire is not responsible for any damage to property or mobs due to usage of Cables)_ ## Compatibility Notes * Tweaked Controllers: Lectern is compatible! ## Credits Textures and models derived from [Create Mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create)
